title: Senior Full Stack Developer
description: Lead development of scalable web applications using modern JavaScript frameworks and RESTful services.
requirements: 5+ years of experience in full stack development
Strong knowledge of React, Next.js, and Node.js
Experience with relational databases and API design
Familiarity with agile delivery and code reviews

title: Mobile Application Developer
description: Build and maintain cross-platform and native mobile applications for enterprise and consumer use cases.
requirements: 3+ years of mobile development experience
Proficiency in Flutter or React Native
Understanding of mobile UI patterns and performance
Experience publishing apps to app stores

title: UI/UX Designer
description: Create user-centred interface designs, wireframes, and prototypes for web and mobile products.
requirements: 3+ years of UI/UX design experience
Proficiency in Figma or similar design tools
Strong portfolio demonstrating UX thinking
Ability to collaborate closely with developers

title: QA Engineer
description: Plan and execute test cases, report defects, and support release quality across software projects.
requirements: 2+ years of software testing experience
Knowledge of manual and API testing
Attention to detail and clear documentation skills
Familiarity with test management tools

title: .NET Application Developer
description: Develop and enhance Windows and enterprise applications using the .NET ecosystem.
requirements: 4+ years of .NET development experience
Experience with C#, ASP.NET, and SQL Server
Understanding of desktop or enterprise architectures
Ability to work with legacy and modern codebases

title: Business Analyst
description: Gather requirements, document workflows, and bridge communication between clients and engineering teams.
requirements: 3+ years in business analysis or similar role
Strong documentation and workshop facilitation skills
Experience with software project lifecycles
Excellent verbal and written communication

title: DevOps Engineer
description: Support CI/CD pipelines, cloud deployments, and environment management for client applications.
requirements: 3+ years of DevOps or cloud operations experience
Experience with AWS, Azure, or similar platforms
Knowledge of Docker and deployment automation
Understanding of monitoring and incident response

title: Junior Software Developer
description: Contribute to feature development, bug fixes, and code quality under senior developer guidance.
requirements: 1+ year of software development experience or relevant projects
Knowledge of at least one modern programming language
Willingness to learn and follow team standards
Basic understanding of databases and APIs
